ai_connection.instructions: Open claude.ai and start a new Project. Upload this file + NEXT_SESSION_BRIEF.md. The AI will have full context instantly.
ai_connection.recovery_prompt: I am Chairman S.C. Thomas of NY Spotlight Report. My repo is nyspotlightreport/sct-agency-bots. I have 117 agents, 222 bots, 150 workflows. My system has Desktop Commander and Claude in Chrome connected. Continue from NEXT_SESSION_BRIEF.md.
ai_connection.plug_and_play: Upload these 3 files to ANY Claude conversation to restore full context

secrets_needed.note: ALL of these are API keys — NOT email passwords. If you lose email access, the system still runs.

plug_and_play_instructions.step2: Set secrets in GitHub repo Settings > Secrets > Actions
plug_and_play_instructions.step4: Trigger 'Sync ALL Secrets to Netlify' in GitHub Actions
plug_and_play_instructions.step5: System fully operational. Upload SYSTEM_IDENTITY.json to Claude for AI context.
plug_and_play_instructions.account_change: If you change GitHub/Claude/email accounts: just re-clone the repo and re-set secrets. All code, data, and configs travel with the repo.
